channel.title: comment on New Wayland
channel.description: Recent content in comment on New Wayland

item.title: Victory to MMT
item.description: With his article Sadly, it’s a complete myth that Britain can’t afford further lockdowns another British neoliberal commentator admits defeat in the face of the unassailble facts and logic of MMT. There will be a mopping up operations and some people will refuse to believe that the bond vigilantes will not be returning to earth like some latter day Deus ex Machina, to set things as the ought to be. Increasingly, though, they are looking like the cranks they are.
